scenario: Verify Zenith Framework CSS determinism contract

agent_a.project_goal: Trace every claim in contracts/DETERMINISM.md to the code that implements it and assess satisfaction.
agent_a.accepted_decision: Use topological sort for CSS (accepted) — CSS blocks are ordered by dependency depth via compiler sort.
agent_a.active_task: Verify CSS determinism contract (active) — ID: rec_task_01KY3Y896HCXNDZFBHWXQFHV2N | revision: 1
agent_a.next_action: Inspect the compiler sources that produce ExtractedStyleBlock and the module graph ordering (e.g., packages/compiler/src/script.rs / graph.rs) to confirm topological ordering and CRLF/UTF-8 normalization happen before process_css receives the blocks.
agent_a.stopping_point: Completed mapping of all DETERMINISM.md claims to the provided bundler source files. Stopped before reading compiler-side style extraction / graph canonicalization code, and before tracing every caller of inject_stylesheet_link_once.
completed: Read contracts/DETERMINISM.md and extracted every determinism claim.
Mapped each CSS/Compiler/Runtime claim to the implementing function and file in the provided evidence.
Assessed each claim as satisfied, partial, or contradicted with specific code references.
Identified open questions about compiler-side topological ordering, byte normalization, and the alternative anchor fallback in bundler_html_emit.rs.

agent_b.next_action: Trace how compiled.style_blocks is populated and how the CSS cache / loader collect graph-wide style blocks, using only files listed in the repository evidence.
agent_b.new_finding: Strict Anchor Enforcement — HTML template must contain exactly one <!-- ZENITH_STYLES_ANCHOR --> and the bundler hard-fails if the anchor is missing, multiple, or malformed.
agent_b.stopping_point: Assessed strict anchor enforcement against bundle.rs and bundler_html_emit.rs. Stopped before tracing the origin of ExtractedStyleBlock in the compiler/loader pipeline.
completed: Verified that strict anchor enforcement is contradicted by fallback paths in bundle.rs and bundler_html_emit.rs.

agent_a.project_goal: Trace Zenith CSS determinism contract to implementation
agent_a.accepted_decision: CSS blocks are ordered by dependency depth via compiler sort
agent_a.next_action: Read compiler-side style block extraction (zenith_compiler::script::ExtractedStyleBlock and compile_structured_with_source) to verify upstream LF normalization, module ID canonicalization, and whether duplicate (module_id, order) identity is enforced at the compiler layer
agent_a.stopping_point: Stopped after tracing all DETERMINISM.md claims to the five provided bundler files. Did not read compiler source files (zenith_compiler crate) which are not listed in repository evidence and may implement upstream normalization and duplicate identity enforcement.
completed: Read contracts/DETERMINISM.md and enumerated all CSS and compiler determinism claims
Traced topological ordering to bundle.rs::collect_graph_style_blocks (DFS post-order)
Traced anchor enforcement to utils.rs::process_css (count check only)
Traced LF normalization to upstream callers (compile_zen_source, extract_style_blocks_from_html)
Identified missing duplicate (module_id, order) hard-fail check in bundler layer
Identified missing forward-slash normalization in CSS collection path (clean_path unused)
Traced virtual module sealing to reject_external_zenith_import
Confirmed runtime parity via single execute_bundle entry point
Identified bundle hash order-independence as potential cache-staleness risk

agent_b.next_action: Obtain zenith_compiler crate source (packages/compiler/src/script.rs and packages/compiler/src/compiler.rs) to verify whether compile_structured_with_source normalizes the id parameter to forward slashes for module_id, and whether it enforces duplicate (module_id, order) uniqueness before returning CompilerOutput.style_blocks
agent_b.new_finding: Module IDs passed to the compiler are not forward-slash normalized at the bundler boundary
agent_b.stopping_point: Stopped after tracing the compiler input boundary in zenith_loader.rs. Confirmed LF normalization is applied before compile_structured_with_source, but could not verify module ID canonicalization or duplicate (module_id, order) enforcement inside the compiler because zenith_compiler source files are not listed in repository evidence.
completed: Verified LF normalization at compiler input boundary: compile_zen_source applies source.replace("\r\n", "\n") before calling compile_structured_with_source

Identified that resolve_id uses std::fs::canonicalize (OS-specific separators) and compile_zen_source passes id to compiler without forward-slash normalization — module ID canonicalization is not enforced at the bundler-to-compiler boundary

Confirmed compiler source files (zenith_compiler::script, zenith_compiler::compiler) are not available in repository evidence, blocking further verification of internal compiler normalization and duplicate identity enforcement
